summary: Completed comprehensive testing of editable credentials_schema feature in AddServerModal and ServerDashboard. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows working correctly. Fixed a bug where empty credentials_schema array was not being saved.
passed_tests: GET /api/servers/memory returns server info with credentials_schema
POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials with credentials_schema updates the schema in mcp_servers collection
POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials with multiple env vars saves all vars
POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials with empty schema clears the schema (BUG FIXED)
credentials_schema persists in database across multiple GET calls
POST /api/servers/add with custom credentials_schema saves the schema
POST /api/servers/parse-github returns server info
Frontend: AddServerModal 'Add Variable' button visible in preview step
Frontend: AddServerModal clicking 'Add Variable' adds new empty row
Frontend: AddServerModal env var key auto-uppercases and removes non-alphanumeric chars
Frontend: AddServerModal Required/Optional toggle works (REQ/OPT label)
Frontend: AddServerModal Remove button (trash icon) visible
Frontend: AddServerModal description/label input works
Frontend: ServerDashboard 'Add custom environment variable' input visible when editing
Frontend: ServerDashboard new env var key auto-uppercases
Frontend: ServerDashboard Add button (+) appends new var to schema
Frontend: ServerDashboard saving credentials sends credentials_schema to backend
Frontend: DashboardHub Installed and Marketplace tabs work correctly
Frontend: Marketplace shows 12 curated servers with categories
Frontend: Marketplace search filters cards (github -> 1 result)
Frontend: Marketplace category filter works (developer -> 2 results)
Frontend: /dashboard/chatwoot loads ChatwootDashboard (not ServerDashboard)
Frontend: /dashboard/{serverName} loads ServerDashboard for dynamic servers
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 1000: fixed empty credentials_schema not being saved)
seed_data_creation: Test servers (test-creds-server) created and cleaned up during testing. MY_CUSTOM_API_KEY added to memory server schema during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editable credentials_schema feature fully implemented and tested. Key changes: 1) AddServerModal.js has editable env vars in preview step with add/remove/edit/toggle functionality (testids: add-env-var-button, env-key-{idx}, env-required-{idx}, env-remove-{idx}, env-label-{idx}). 2) ServerDashboard.js has 'Add custom environment variable' section when editing credentials (testids: new-env-key-input, add-new-env-button). 3) Backend POST /api/servers/{name}/credentials now accepts credentials_schema in payload and updates mcp_servers collection. 4) Fixed bug where empty credentials_schema array was not being saved (changed 'if payload.credentials_schema:' to 'if payload.credentials_schema is not None:'). All marketplace and DashboardHub features continue to work correctly.

bug_fixed.description: Empty credentials_schema array was not being saved to database
bug_fixed.root_cause: Condition 'if payload.credentials_schema:' is falsy for empty list []
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to 'if payload.credentials_schema is not None:' to allow empty arrays
